text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and the gathering of people in the meeting room evoke a collective concentration, as if ideas are being forged. The next space, with its bold R+D graphics and explanatory panels, surrounds me with the energy of innovation—thoughts swirl about the intersection of humanity and technology. I sense the hum of minds occupied with the future, and I am quietly eager to join their explorations.
